data.name: Eldrea: SEX Saga 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Are you ready to get skyrocketed from your boring routine to the virtual world? Eldrea: SEX Saga 🔞 is a visual novel with RPG elements where you can experience the thrill of being teleported into the intriguing world of your favourite game - you’re the hero there!

Step into the shoes of the protagonist - a regular guy struggling with self-esteem and a lack of meaningful career or relationships. The only important thing in his life is Eldrea - a thrilling virtual world where he has a sense of purpose and identity.

You and other fans have been anticipating the "The Curse of Lilith" update for so long, and it’s finally here. You click install, it downloads and… welcome to the virtual world, take care - you’re the Chosen One destined to save the world from the Dark Curse!

Every Don Quixote needs his Sancho Panza, so you meet the charming Jenny, who believes in the prophecy and offers her help and guidance - set off on a journey to gather powerful artefacts and allies to defeat Lilith, the source of the course, together!

Meet various characters, get familiar with different local places, races and cultures, navigate through intense fights and improve your skills, discover the deepest secrets and desires of people you meet and become the true hero of Eldrea!

Features:
  • Enchanting fantasy world - get immersed in the stunningly crafted world of Eldrea.
  • Intriguing storyline - experience a deep interactive narrative that explores your deepest fantasies.
  • Stunning visuals - enjoy the diligently created high-quality 3D graphics and animations, we’re pushing the boundaries with this one!
  • A whole lot of various 18+ content - this world is mature and takes no excuses, so prepare for really lewd and hot scenes touching various topics!
  • Battle system - learn talents, improve your skills, throw the dice and show them that you’re really the Chosen One.
  • Complex characters - discover their hearts and bodies on your way to saving the world!
  • Intuitive controls - real heroes can fight and win with just one hand!

data.short_description: Ready to dive into a world where fantasy and desire intertwine into one incredible experience? Eldrea: SEX Saga🔞 takes you on a captivating adventure where the lines between reality and virtuality blur.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
